title: Municipal Dashboard
description: Administrative platform centralizing 24 municipal management modules with SSO authentication via Keycloak, TanStack Query, Docker and scalable architecture.

title: Revenue Collection System
description: Financial dashboard with advanced filters, date-based reports, collection indicators and operational performance analysis.

title: Real-Time Voting System
description: Voting platform for SUTEPA with instant results, geographic segmentation and participation dashboards.

title: Manga Collection Manager
description: Collection management system with Excel import, change history, automatic changelog, statistics and Supabase.
